mission.title: traefik: Traefik 3.6.0: add option to disable Traefik Hub Demo in dashboard
mission.description: Traefik 3.6.0: add option to disable Traefik Hub Demo in dashboard. Requested by 49+ users.

steps.title: Understand the feature request
steps.description: Users requested an option like `--disable-dashboard-demo` to remove the Traefik Hub demo section from the Traefik dashboard in version 3.6.0 and later.

steps.title: Review the Traefik team's decision
steps.description:
The Traefik maintainers reviewed the request and decided NOT to implement it. Their rationale:
- The demo menu is collapsed by default
- It does not interfere with the regular dashboard workflow
- It provides value for users exploring Traefik Hub capabilities

See the source issue for the full discussion: https://github.com/traefik/traefik/issues/12250

steps.title: Workaround: hide the demo section with CSS (optional)
steps.description: If the demo section is unwanted, you can use a custom middleware to inject CSS that hides it, or use a browser extension like uBlock Origin to block the demo section element in the Traefik dashboard UI.

resolution.summary: The Traefik team declined this feature request. After review, they decided to keep the demo section in the dashboard. The demo menu is collapsed by default and does not interfere with the regular workflow. The team believes it serves a valuable purpose for users who want to explore Traefik Hub's capabilities directly from their open-source installation. No option to disable it will be added.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with traefik installed or the issue environment reproducible.
